prompt:
Create a polished Remotion micro-lesson explaining gradient descent as a ball rolling down a loss curve. Include an animated curve, moving dot, and two concise labels.

Style profile: Clean Light Learning UI.

Use a bright off-white or white background, black or near-black primary text, generous spacing, crisp cards, one restrained blue or green accent, and no low-contrast gray labels. Aim for Apple-like clarity and readable learning-app UI.

Accessibility and polish constraints: all important text must be high contrast, large enough to read in a video preview, and never rely on opacity below 0.72. Avoid gray-on-dark labels, tiny captions, crowded layouts, and black intro frames. The midpoint frame should already show the main artifact clearly.
